response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth across developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms, with clear leadership in open-source projects and workshops, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience and organizational change leadership, which are critical for this managerial role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools and test infrastructure (e.g., Trial, Fluent-Asserts, Selenium course).
Proven mobile platform expertise through iOS/Apple TV app development and cross-platform contributions.
Strong track record of technical mentoring and knowledge sharing via workshops and open-source projects.
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities in employment history.
Lacks explicit experience leading organizational change or setting cross-team technical roadmaps.
Current role at Stripe (2025–present) is listed as future-dated, raising questions about resume accuracy.
